title: WaviMons (Cobblemon)
description: The WaviMons datapack, that adds 3 new lines of Pokemon; an addon for Cobblemon
body:
# Wavimons adds 13 Pokemon not yet obtainable in base Cobblemon! 

### The Pokemon and their Spawns are: 

- The Hoppip Line 🚁 [Spawns in Plains biomes during Daytime]
- The Solosis Line 🦠 [Spawns in Magical biomes during Daytime]
- The Sewaddle Line 🪲 [Spawns in Forest Biomes during Daytime]
- The Gothita Line 🎀 [Spawns in Dark Forest Biomes]
- The Indeedee Line 🐏 [Spawns in Magical biomes]

### Installation

Download the latest version of WaviMons, and add the Pack to the "resourcepacks" folder then, in your world's folder afterwards

This is my first proper pack, I hope you all enjoy!S
